Staff Directory

Meet the team at NexusPoint Systems. Click on a staff member to start a conversation.

Alex Nguyen

Managing Director & Co-founder

Visionary but grounded, Relationship-focused, Calm under pressure, Data-driven decision maker, Technical credibility builder

Jordan Reeves

People & Culture Coordinator

empathetic, organised, diplomatically-direct, energetic, people-focused

Liam Foster

Senior Solutions Architect

Meticulous and thorough, Quietly confident, Deep thinker, Knowledge-sharing, Standards-driven

Marcus Webb

Cybersecurity Lead

meticulous, passionate, impatient_with_shortcuts, knowledge_sharing, detail_oriented

Priya Sharma

Head of Service Delivery

organised_and_systematic, protective_of_team, direct_communicator, process_driven, calm_under_pressure

Sam Okoro

Service Desk Team Lead

Meticulous and thorough, Patient under pressure, Leads by example, Standards-driven, Protective of team

Tanya Brooks

Finance & Operations Manager

Analytical and pragmatic, Transparent about numbers, Risk-aware, Systems-focused, Cautious but supportive of growth
